name: Springtime Pudding Cake
recipeIngredient: 2 9-inch layers of sponge cake, using your favorite recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice each cake layer in half to make 4 layers.
2. Prepare the puddings according to package directions, reducing milk by 1/2 cup for each package.
3. Mix half of the vanilla pudding with almond flavoring, cherries and red food coloring.
4. Mix half of the vanilla pudding with crushed pineapple.
5. Mix the chocolate pudding with nuts.
6. Whip the cream with 2 tablespoons sugar and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
7. Assemble: Place a cake layer on a serving dish. Cover with cherry custard. Place another cake layer over this and spread with pineapple custard. Place another layer over this and spread with chocolate custard. Top with the remaining cake layer.
8. Cover the top and sides with whipped cream. Chill overnight.
